critical: Groq API blocked (org restricted) — no LLM intelligence since iteration 446; ALL 175 subsequent iterations ran on deterministic fallback

high: OpenCode Zen 404 (minimax/m2.7 model) — secondary LLM routing path broken
Copilot rate limit (429 weekly quota) — tertiary routing path exhausted

ideas_this_sprint: Expose risk gate rejection reasons in API (deterministic fallback — repeated 175 iterations)
summary: 620 iterations completed across 18.8 hours. Backend unit tests fully passing (364/364, 100%). Arb edge model promoted at 92.3% accuracy from 188 candidates. Three critical blockers persist: (1) Groq API organization restricted since iteration 446, locking the loop in deterministic fallback; (2) Git HTTPS push disabled due to no TTY for credential prompt; (3) Playwright E2E regression from 99% to 35.5% caused by risk gate API schema changes. Active loop daemon continues running on nohup at iteration 620+.
recommendations: Fix git push: set up SSH key or gh auth login to enable remote commits
Restore LLM intelligence: start ollama service with llama3.2:3b, or deploy a model via ngrok/vLLM on Colab Pro (V100 available)
Fix Playwright E2E: revert risk gate API response schema changes or update Playwright assertions to match new schema
Fix /api/opportunities: register missing route in FastAPI router
Convert print() statements to get_logger(__name__) across 50+ locations
De-duplicate scheduler jobs: add id + replace_existing=True to add_job calls
